plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`.

plugins.notes: Company base context. Set via `wzrdx company set`; profile at .wzrdx/company.json (+ company.md for KB ingestion).

plugins.notes: Web scraping / search for market evaluation. Needs API key; adopt when market-eval volume justifies it.
